title: Throttle Warn
description: Emitted when a state's tool-call count reaches warn_max within a single state visit.

state.description: State name where throttle warning was triggered

count.description: Current tool-call count at time of emission

normal_max.description: Configured normal_max threshold for this state

warn_max.description: Configured warn_max threshold for this state

hard_max.description: Configured hard_max threshold for this state
